previousVerdict: rejected (attempt 1 — ACC-001: missing <ApplicationRole> generic param on ApplicationRoleStore)

fixVerification.description: Line 53 was `.AddRoleStore<ApplicationRoleStore>()` — missing mandatory generic type parameter
evidence: ApplicationRoleStore.cs:16-17 — `public class ApplicationRoleStore<TRole> : IRoleStore<TRole> where TRole : ApplicationRole, new()`
ApplicationRole.cs:29-31 — parameterless constructor exists, satisfying `new()` constraint

codeExamples.location: Section: Configure provider integration, code block 1 (lines 46-65)
codeExamples.notes: All six fluent API calls match source code. Generic type parameters correct: ApplicationUser (IdentityUser<int>), ApplicationRole (IdentityRole<int>), ApplicationUserStore<ApplicationUser> (constraint satisfied), ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole> (constraint satisfied including new()). Matches DancingGoat/Program.cs:159-174 and UITests/Program.cs:111-125. The doc omits .AddRoleManager<RoleManager<ApplicationRole>>() present in DancingGoat but absent in UITests — legitimate simplification.

preExistingObservations.observation: NuGet package referenced as 'Microsoft.AspNet.Authentication.*' — modern ASP.NET Core package is 'Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.*' (missing 'Core'). Pre-existing content, not part of TASK-005 scope. Recommend separate issue to address.
